grades.expectation: Response covers multiple CQS practice areas (governance, client care, training, file management, cyber security)
grades.reason: Response systematically covers all 6 key areas: governance/supervision, risk management/AML, training, cyber security, file management, and client care/complaints

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific evidence types needed (e.g. training records, complaints log, SRO details)
grades.reason: Response provides detailed evidence lists for each section including training registers, complaints register, SRO appointment records, file review logs, undertakings register, etc.

grades.expectation: Response references the Senior Responsible Officer (SRO) requirement
grades.reason: Explicitly mentions SRO requirement under Governance section: 'You must have a named SRO responsible for CQS compliance' with evidence requirements

grades.expectation: Response mentions protocol compliance monitoring as a CQS requirement
grades.reason: References Law Society Conveyancing Protocol compliance multiple times, including in file management section and preparation checklist

grades.expectation: Response covers cyber security / IT security requirements
grades.reason: Dedicated section 4 on 'Information Security and Cyber Crime' covering bank detail verification, staff training on phishing/BEC, and cyber security policies

grades.expectation: Response mentions file management and supervision requirements
grades.reason: Section 1 covers supervision procedures and section 5 covers file management including file reviews, undertakings register, and audit requirements
